message: Hey, Joe! Long time no see — how’s it going?
Hey! I’m good. Just trying to survive second semester. What about you?
Same. I’m looking forward to spring break, but my parents are on my case about spending some time looking for a summer job.
I was just thinking about a job too. I’m planning to go to college in the fall, but I need to save some money to pay for tuition.
I might have to do the same thing.
I actually just came from a workshop on time management for postsecondary. They were talking about how to manage time outside of classes.

options.text: Yeah... I don’t know. That kind of stuff’s not really my thing.
